sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَ خَالِدٌ بَيْعَ بَعْضِ كُتُبِهِ القَدِيمَةِ.
sentences.translation: Halid je odlučio prodati neke stare knjige.
sentences.translationEn: Khalid decided to sell some of his old books.

sentences.translation: Postavio ih je ispred kuće po odgovarajućim cijenama.
sentences.translationEn: He put them in front of the house at reasonable prices.

sentences.arabic: جَاءَ جِيرَانٌ وَاشْتَرَوْا مِنْهُ عِدَّةَ كُتُبٍ.
sentences.translation: Komšije su došle i kupile od njega nekoliko knjiga.
sentences.translationEn: Neighbors came and bought several books from him.

sentences.arabic: جَمَعَ خَالِدٌ بَعْضَ النُّقُودِ وَوَضَعَهَا فِي صُنْدُوقِهِ.
sentences.translation: Halid je sakupio nešto novca i stavio ga u svoju kutiju.
sentences.translationEn: Khalid collected some money and put it in his box.
